name: Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc.
summary: Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc. is a Cayman Islands exempted blank check company formed to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It completed its IPO on January 23, 2026, raising $300,150,000 gross proceeds from 30,015,000 units at $10.00 each, with funds held in trust pending an initial business combination targeting enterprises valued between $500 million and $2 billion.

products.name: Class A Ordinary Share Units
products.description: IPO units each consisting of one Class A ordinary share and one-third of a redeemable warrant, sold at $10.00 per unit.

products.name: Private Placement Warrants
products.description: Warrants sold privately to the Sponsor and underwriters at $1.50 each, generating $7,300,000 in gross proceeds.

partnerships.description: Sponsor entity that purchased 3,126,666 Private Placement Warrants at $1.50 each in connection with the IPO.
Acts as trustee for the Trust Account holding $300,150,000 in net proceeds from the IPO and Private Placement.
